title: 11L MLP3x + Int6 QAT + XSA + EMA + BigramHash + FA3 (val_bpb 1.1345)
body:
## 11L MLP3x + Int6 QAT + XSA + EMA + BigramHash + FA3

**Best val_bpb: 1.1345** (seed 2025) | **Mean: 1.1364** (3 seeds) | **Artifact: 15.37MB**

### Results

| Seed | val_bpb | Steps | ms/step | Artifact |
|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| 2025 | **1.1345** | 6810 | 88.10 | 15,369,315 |
| 42 | 1.1368 | 6136 | 97.78 | 15,248,694 |
| 1337 | 1.1379 | 6366 | 94.24 | 15,579,821 |

All runs under the 16,000,000 byte cap. Trained on 8×H100 SXM within the 600s wallclock budget.

### Key recipe

- 11 layers, dim 512, GQA (8/4), 3× MLP (SwiGLU)
- Int6 STE QAT + zstd-22 compression
- XSA on last 4 layers, EMA (0.997), BigramHash(2048)
- Muon (momentum=0.99, WD=0.04) + Adam
- Sliding-window eval at stride=64
- FlashAttention 3 (Hopper build) required

### Requirements

```
pip install sentencepiece zstandard
# FA3:
cd /tmp && git clone https://github.com/Dao-AILab/flash-attention.git
cd flash-attention/hopper && pip install .
```

### Files

- `README.md` — explanation
- `submission.json` — metadata with 3-seed results
- `train_gpt.py` — exact script
- `train.log` — best seed (2025) full log

comments.body: Closing — this is a straight PR #287 reproduction without novel ML contributions. Will resubmit if/when we have something beyond the existing recipe.
